samplePacks.name: bassWarsaw
samplePacks.usage: primary bass synth in Salut Nu, Something about Drums

samplePacks.name: nujazz_keys120 / nujazz_keys125
samplePacks.usage: nu-jazz piano samples in Salut Nu, Café Tiède

samplePacks.name: nujazz_bass125 / nujazz_bass120
samplePacks.usage: sliced jazz upright bass in Café Tiède, Force Motrice

samplePacks.name: sunny_bass / sunny_brass / acidOto3092
samplePacks.usage: custom sunny pack + acid synth in Sunny Side Up

samplePacks.name: FMRhodes1 / FMRhodes2
samplePacks.usage: FM Rhodes piano in Force Motrice, Permanence

samplePacks.name: giorgio_syn
samplePacks.usage: Moroder synth in Force Motrice and Bain Électrique

samplePacks.name: nujazz_wahwah125
samplePacks.usage: wah-wah guitar samples in Salut Nu

samplePacks.name: weird_dialogs
samplePacks.usage: sci-fi movie dialogs about electricity in Bain Électrique

samplePacks.name: suns_keys / suns_guitar / suns_voice
samplePacks.usage: Leifur James-inspired samples in L'Or Bleu

ingredients.description: 90 BPM atmospheric techno opener
Aeolian high lead: sparse questioning melody -  'Winds of truth'
Dual 90s synth: aerial questions and electronic answers
Juxtaposed reversal at 50% stereo width on lead
Quarter-note delay with moderate feedback on answer synth
128 BPM electro breaks -  'ex Bain Bouillant'
Long-form Giorgio bass: 8-bar phrase with chromatic F#-B-G-D movement
30+ sci-fi dialog samples about atomic energy, electricity, faith -  sequenced as narrative
Guitar granularly sliced with evolving rhythmic density
Global octave bus on single MIDI knob -  transforms everything
120 BPM nu-jazz with 3-layer mute system
Warsaw bass with octave doubling, Am melody with chromatic F#4 surprise
Nu-jazz keys, wah-wah guitar, and live jazz beats -  all sliced
Piano reflected: juxtaposed reversed copy from halfway, octave up
MIDI-controlled spectral freeze on piano samples
125 BPM nu-jazz -  lukewarm café tempo
Sliced jazz upright bass with MIDI-controlled bitcrush
125BPM jazz piano + jungle breaks for rhythmic backbone
FM Rhodes with Euclidean note repetition on Cm-G-Eb-Bb-C-F progression
Subtle octave doubling on secondary piano layer
125 BPM DnB -  'Atelier de force motrice'
Sparse FM Rhodes: G sustain then chromatic surprise (F, As, C6)
Jazz bass, Giorgio synth, and cello bowed for triple melodic texture
Bass slice pattern that doubles and quadruples density per bar
Bitcrush on Giorgio synth Euclidean pad
120 BPM upbeat sunny lounge
Custom sunny pack: bass stays on root 4 bars, brass deploys via mask
Arpeggiated acid synth on F-Ab-C-G with dual Euclidean rhythm
Patient bass: 4 bars on root then slow harmonic evolution
Dual sub-octave on same knob for massive low end
160 BPM fast DnB with jazz chord voicings

ingredients.code: note (cat ["[bf3, d4, f4, a4]", "[a3, c4, e4, g4]", ...] - 12) # "bassWarsaw"
ingredients.description: Bbmaj7-Am7-Dm9-G7 jazz chord progression on Warsaw bass at half speed
DrumTraks snare, drum rolls, and jungle breaks for rhythmic variety
FM Rhodes2 with +2 semitone adjustment to C, modIndex MIDI-controlled
Eighth-note delay with 50% feedback on moogBass pad
150 BPM -  DnB collab with Raph

ingredients.code: note ("<c4 ef4 <bf3 <g3 g4>> <af3 f4 af3 af4>>") # "moogBass"
ingredients.description: Dark chromatic moogBass: C-Eb-Bb/G-Ab/F with octave jumps
NES bass, distorted guitar slices, and synth pads
Superfork melody: sustained G then chromatic descent with octave doubling
Guitar dual destruction: bitcrush + distortion on separate MIDI knobs
94 BPM downtempo -  Leifur James-inspired golden hour
3-part original sample pack: keys, guitar, and voice
8-cycle piano loop chopped into 16 grains with Leslie modulation
Weighted timing bass (1.5+1.5+3) with Euclidean sub-patterns
MIDI Leslie speaker on piano: rotary warmth
